mapper.select: select task_id as taskId, instance_id as instanceId, task_name as taskName, instance_no as instanceNo, instance_title as instanceTitle, task_state as taskState, task_result as taskResult, assignee_name_snapshot as assigneeNameSnapshot, assigned_at as assignedAt, completed_at as completedAt from t_bpm_task where instance_id = #{instanceId} and task_state = 1 order by assigned_at asc, task_id asc
